description.value:
Below is a list of optional features for the Sealed Beast Class mod, that offers an alternative, but slightly weaker option for the Sealed Beast Class mod. These options are for players that want to attempt to find a middle ground, work with, or even befriend their Sealed Beast in some way.

When you would gain the 3rd level of this Class Mod, you can choose to not increase your level in this Class Mod, instead waiting for a time at which your Sealed Beast is ready to trust you with more power. When you do this, you cannot gain any benefits from the Controlled Beast Class Mod feature. While you are benefiting from this feature, your Bargain Check DC is decreased by your level in this Class Mod.

At any point in time, your Sealed Beast can take away these optional features if it feels that you are manipulating it in any way, either by lying, going against your word, or forcing it to give you chakra against its will more than it is willing to accept. Similarly, you can choose to lose these features and instead gain the benefits of Controlled Beast, though you can never go back.

You've started seeing the Sealed Beast inside you as a person, equal, or maybe even a friend, though the feeling may not be mutual. However, your treatment hasn't gone unnoticed. You are more respectful of your Sealed Beast and want to avoid using them as much as possible. In exchange, the Sealed Beast is much less likely to manipulate you, disrupt your chakra, and influence your emotions.
